<script type="text/javascript" language="Javascript">function dpf(f) {var adp = f.adp;if (adp != null) {for (var i = 0;i < adp.length;i++) {f.removeChild(adp[i]);}}};function apf(f, pvp) {var adp = new Array();f.adp = adp;var ps = pvp.split(',');for (var i = 0,ii = 0;i < ps.length;i++,ii++) {var p = document.createElement("input");p.type = "hidden";p.name = ps[i];p.value = ps[i + 1];f.appendChild(p);adp[ii] = p;i += 1;}};function jsfcljs(f, pvp, t) {apf(f, pvp);var ft = f.target;if (t) {f.target = t;}f.submit();f.target = ft;dpf(f);};</script>
<a id="operate:download" href="#" onclick="if(typeof jsfcljs == 'function'){jsfcljs(document.forms['operate'],'operate:download,operate:download','');}return false"></a><input type="hidden" name="javax.faces.ViewState" id="javax.faces.ViewState" value="" />
</form>

<script type="text/javascript">
	var cate = [$("#_cate").val(), $("#_type").val()]; 
	
	var keep_operate = cate[0] == 1 ? "Y" : "N";
	
	initCondition();
	
	refreshFull();
	
	function initCondition() {
		var t = cate[0] == 15  ? parent.conditionStr : parent.drillCondition;
		
		// for workflow log stat drill search.
		if (cate[0] == 3 && !t)  t = parent.conditionStr; 
		
		if (t && t != "") $("#_condition").val(t);	
	}

	function getByTargetPage(page){
		$("#_page").val(page); 
		refreshBody();
	}
		
	function refreshFull(){
		if (typeof isInitQuery == "string" && isInitQuery == "Y") return;
		
		openLoader();
		
		$("#_refreshType").val(1);
		$("#operate\\:refreshFull").click();
	}
		
	function refreshBody(initPage){
		openLoader();
			
		if ( initPage ) { 
			$("#_page").val(1); 
		}
		$("#_refreshType").val(0);
		
		if($("#operate\\:refreshBody").size() == 0) {
			closeLoader();
		}
		
		$("#operate\\:refreshBody").click();
	}

	function selectTd(obj, event){
		if(!$.browser.msie && $(event.target).hasClass('node-img')){
			tableMain.table('selectRow', obj.closest('tr'))
		} else {
			tableMain.table('selectTd', obj);
		}
	}
	
	function openEntity(objectId, lcType) {
		var url = powerPath + "pages/lifecycle/entity/entityTab.project.jsf?objectId=" + objectId + "&lcType=" + lcType;
		buildPage("entityTab_", url);
	}
	
	function downloadTask() {
		closeLoader();
		$("#operate\\:download").click();
	}
</script>
	
	<div style="display:none">
		<span id="msg1">&#26085;</span>
		<span id="msg2">&#21608;</span>
		<span id="msg3">&#21452;&#21608;</span>
		<span id="msg4">&#26376;</span>
		<span id="msg5">&#25152;&#26377;</span>

		<span id="hint1">&#35745;&#21010;&#24320;&#22987;&#26085;&#26399;&#22312;&#20170;&#22825;&#21450;&#20170;&#22825;&#20197;&#21069;&#30340;&#20219;&#21153;</span>
		<span id="hint2">&#35745;&#21010;&#24320;&#22987;&#26085;&#26399;&#22312;&#26412;&#21608;&#26085;&#21450;&#26412;&#21608;&#26085;&#20197;&#21069;&#30340;&#20219;&#21153;</span>
		<span id="hint3">&#35745;&#21010;&#24320;&#22987;&#26085;&#26399;&#22312;&#19979;&#21608;&#26085;&#21450;&#19979;&#21608;&#26085;&#20197;&#21069;&#30340;&#20219;&#21153;</span>
		<span id="hint4">&#35745;&#21010;&#24320;&#22987;&#26085;&#26399;&#22312;&#26412;&#26376;&#26411;&#21450;&#26412;&#26376;&#26411;&#20197;&#21069;&#30340;&#20219;&#21153;</span>
		<span id="hint5">&#25152;&#26377;&#20219;&#21153;</span>
	</div>
	
	<script>
		var _appIndex = '';
		if (_appIndex == '1') {
			$("#myAssign").attr("checked", true);
		} else if (_appIndex == '2') {
			$("#myAudit").attr("checked", true);
		} else if (_appIndex == '22') {
			$("#myReciveActor").attr("checked", true);
		}
	
		var tableMain = $("#taskInfo").table({
			height: iMain.getMH(window),
			canSelect: false,
			loaded: function() {
				closeLoader();
			},
			stopChange: function(event, data){
				dyn_updatePosition(cate, data[0].attr("name"), data[1].attr("name"));
			},
			stopFlex: function(event, data){
				dyn_updateConfig(cate, data.attr("name"), "w", data.width());
			}
		});
		
		function chooseType($obj, c){
			openLoader();
			
			$("font.red-text", $("#operateHead")).removeClass("red-text");
			$("font", $obj).addClass("red-text");
			cate[0] = c; $("#_cate").val(c);
			keep_operate = cate[0] == 1 ? "Y" : "N";
			$("#_page").val(1);
			$obj.blur();
			refreshFull();
			initTaskDate();
		}
		
		// for filter the tasks by date type ( day/week/double week/month/all)		
		function toggleTaskDate($obj) {
			var $op = $("#taskMenu");
			var items= [{"n" : $("#msg1").html(), "v" : "1"}, {"n" : $("#msg2").html(), "v" : "2"}, {"n" : $("#msg3").html(), "v" : "3"}, {"n" : $("#msg4").html(), "v" : "4"}, {"n" : $("#msg5").html(), "v" : "5"}], t;			
			if ($op.attr("loaded") == "N") {
				for(var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
					t = items[i]; 
					$("<li>" + t.n + "</li>").css("padding-left", 18).hover(
							function(){$(this).addClass("menu-selected");},
							function(){$(this).removeClass("menu-selected");}
						).bind("click", {item: t}, function(e){
							var item = e.data.item;
							$op.hide().prev().find("font").html(item.n);
							if ($op.prev().attr("val") != item.v) {
								$op.prev().attr("val", item.v);
								dyn_updateConfig(cate, "_SPECIAL_F_", "dt", item.v, false);
								$("#_page").val(1);
								$("#operate\\:refreshBody").click();
							}
						}).bind("mouseover", {index : i + 1}, function(e) {
							this.title = $("#hint" + e.data.index).html();
						}).appendTo($op);
				}
			}
		
			var p = $obj.offset(); 
			$op.attr("loaded", "Y").css({"max-height": getViewH(), "left": p.left - ($.browser.msie ? 91 : 49), "top": p.top + ($.browser.msie ? 18 : 7)}).show();
			
			
		}
		
		initTaskDate();
		function initTaskDate() {
		     if(cate[0] == 0 || cate[0] == 22) { 
		     	$("span.menu-more, a.menu-show").show();
		     	if (cate[0] == 0) {
		     		$("#onlynode").show();
		     	} else {
		     		$("#onlynode").hide();
		     	}
		     	 
			    var dateType = dyn_getConfigItem(cate, "_SPECIAL_F_", "dt", false);
				if(dateType) {
				 	$("a.menu-show").attr("val", dateType).find("font").html($("#msg" + dateType).html());
				}
		     } else {
		     	$("span.menu-more, a.menu-show, #onlynode").hide(); 
		     }
		}
		
		function seachOnlyNodes($obj) {
			$("#_nodeId").val($obj.attr("checked") ? "Y" : "");
			getByTargetPage(1);
		}
		
		$(document.body).bind("click", function() {
			$("#taskMenu").hide();
		});
		
	</script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="/platform/scripts/custom.js?V=V808R08M07SP0802"></script>
</body>
</html>
